title.en: Building context from an existing project - Financial dashboard
title.es: Construyendo contexto desde un proyecto existente - Dashboard financiero

description.en: Audit and operationalize an existing full-stack repository with AI support: validate generated understanding, define actionable rules in .agents/rules, and produce a memory-bank with product, stack, and current status.
description.es: Audita y operacionaliza un repositorio full-stack existente con apoyo de IA: valida la comprensión generada, define reglas accionables en .agents/rules y crea un memory-bank con producto, stack y estado actual.

sharing.en: I just completed the Building context from an existing project - Financial dashboard with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy: repo analysis with AI, actionable rules, and a project memory-bank. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/company-financial-dashboard-context-project #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #Git #Documentation
sharing.es: Acabo de completar el Building context from an existing project - Financial dashboard con LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy: análisis de repo con IA, reglas accionables y memory-bank del proyecto. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/company-financial-dashboard-context-project #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #Git #Documentacion

sharing.en: Built and documented: Building context from an existing project - Financial dashboard. From sparse handover to clear engineering rules and memory-bank with @4GeeksAcademy. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/company-financial-dashboard-context-project #AIEngineering #RepositoryStewardship #4GeeksAcademy
